file_insights.changes_summary: Replaced 'results' display with 'allTests' display, updated rendering logic for test statuses and screenshots

patterns_discovered: Conditional rendering of test list based on test availability
Handling of screenshot links for tests
Fallback UI for empty test scenarios
gotchas_discovered: Potential data structure change from 'results' to 'allTests'
Need to handle different property names (test.name vs result.testName)
Maintaining similar UI structure while changing underlying data model

approach_outcome.description: Replaced results display with allTests display showing all tests with status icons

recommendations: Create a separate TestStatusIcon component for reusability
Consider adding more robust error handling for missing test data
Implement consistent naming conventions between data models
